title: 2 Pcs Over Door Hanger, Black Over Door Hook, Plastic Overdoor Hook Hanger for Bedroom, Clothes, Towel, Hats, Bags
features: No Need for Drilling, Easy Installation: This over the door hanger is designed for hassle-free installation—no drilling or tools required. Simply hang it on your door to use instantly. It won’t damage the door surface, and is a time-saving, labor-saving solution suitable for most standard door thicknesses

Multi Hook Design for More Efficient Storage: This over door coat hooks system includes 5 strong hooks, perfect for hanging coats, bags, hats, towels, and more. It maximizes vertical space and improves storage efficiency, helping keep your room tidy and well-organized

Durable and Sturdy, Not Easily Deformed: Made from high-quality, thickened plastic, this door hanger offers excellent durability and a strong load-bearing capacity. It resists rust and bending, ensuring long-term use without deformation or instability

Suitable for Most Doors: The over door hooks measure 4.5cm x 28cm and are suitable for doors up to 4cm thick. Please ensure your door has a minimum top clearance of 2.5mm before installation for a proper fit

Widely Applicable and Versatile in Multiple Scenarios: Whether in bedrooms, bathrooms, kitchens, or offices, this over the door hook fits a variety of environments. Use it as a towel hook, coat rack, or bag holder—an ideal home organizer to improve space usage in any room
